description_long: This is a high-back swivel chair featuring a contoured, padded seat and backrest upholstered in a dark textured fabric. The chair's sides and rear are covered in a brown faux leather or suede material, providing a stylish contrast and a touch of sophistication. The armrests are gently curved, made of a hard material with matching brown padding on top for comfort. The chair sits atop a sturdy, five-legged black metal base equipped with smooth-rolling casters for mobility. A central support column, likely telescoping, connects the seat to the base and includes a visible adjustment lever for height or tilt. The overall design is ergonomic, blending comfort and functionality, making it suitable for office or urban indoor environments.
description: A high-back swivel chair with dark fabric upholstery, brown faux leather sides, padded armrests, and a five-legged wheeled base. It features ergonomic contouring and a visible adjustment lever.
description_view_0: Side view showing the chair's contoured back, brown side panels, padded armrest, and the central support column with a visible adjustment lever.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tall, brown faux leather backrest and the symmetrical five-legged base with casters.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, displaying the armrest, side panel, and the chair's ergonomic profile.
description_view_3: Front view showing the padded seat and backrest, both upholstered in dark fabric, as well as both armrests and the adjustment lever on the right side.
attribute_central_support_column: A black metal telescoping column with a matte finish, connecting the seat to the five-legged wheeled base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, contoured backrest with ergonomic padding, upholstered in dark textured fabric on the front and brown faux leather on the sides and rear.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved armrests with a hard structural core and brown padded tops, attached to the seat and backrest frame.
